data.venue_city: Avenida Rumichaca y Calle Moromoro, Chillogallo, Quito
data.boss_ai_decision:
STATUS: Limited data. Available metrics consistently favor Aucas.
REASON: Aucas shows superior xG (1.66), PPG (1.86), and strong bookmaker favorability (1.35). These indicators align for a dominant home performance against Manta FC.
CONCLUSION: Home Win.
